titleStmt.title: SII 4.673: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 673. (A.R. No. 223 of 1892). ON THE SAME PILLAR.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrījayalakṣmīnāthaḥ svabhujābalavijitaparadharādhipa
yūthassa jayati vibhavamahēṁdrō jagati kulōttuṁggacōḍa
goṁkanarēṁdraḥ [. 1*] yasya pratāpaprabalānalā¨rcci¨rddagdhānyabhūbhṛ
dvaradhāmarāji¨rbhītānyarakṣāmaniśaṁ praku[¨rvva]nkōpaprasā
dadvayamadvibhāti [. 2*] tadgoṁkakṣitipakramabhaktērācaraṇavidyayā
cā¨ryyatayā . yuktaḥ kūtayanāmna ścelvāṁbāyāssupu
trakaḥ pātranidhiḥ [. 3*] śrīviśvaka¨rmmamunivaravaṁśakaraḥ kāntiviji
tasitarugnānābharaṇācā¨ryyōyō jayati sa bhuvi ka¨rmmarābharaṇaḥ [. 4*] sauja
nyapuṇyanilayō nūṁkāṁḍissuprasiddhapau¨rṣanirataḥ svaguṇamaṇigaṇa
vibhūṣaṇabhūṣitamitrō virājatē sucaritraḥ [. 5*] kararasaviyadiṁdumi
tē śakarājasamōtkarē śubhayuktē . kā¨rttikasitapaṁcamyāṁ gurusi
ddhadinē suyōgayutē [. 6*] nādiṁḍlamūlasaṁsthitacaṁdradharāya pradīpamā
caṁdrā¨rkkaṁ . prādātsa vaṁśadīpō nūṁkāṁḍi[¨r]ggoṁkamaṁḍalikapadabhaktaḥ [. 7*]
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kulōttuṁgacōḍagoṁkkarājuna kiṣṭabhrityuṁḍu
nu viśvaka¨rmmakulasaṁbhavuṁḍunu jananāthanaṁdanuṁḍunaina kūtāṁḍi
koḍuku nūṁkāṁḍi śakava¨rṣamulu 1063 gunēṇṭi viṣuvuna nādiṁḍla
śrīmūlasthānamahādēvara kakhaṁḍava[¨r]ttidīpaṁbuna kiccina goṟiya
lu 55 . vīniṁ jēkoni yācakamārebōyukoḍuku gaṁḍe putrānu
pautrakamu nitya māneṁḍu neyi dīpamunakuṁ bōyaṁgalavāṁḍu .
¿ svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdarāṁ . ṣaṣi¨rva¨rṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ [. 8*] bahubhi¨rvasudā dattā bahubhiccānupāli
tā(n) . yesya yesya yedā bhūmiḥ tasya tasya dadā phalaṁ [. 2*]
Digital edition of SII 4.673 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
